known_issues: Logo is not reverting to the user's previously saved logo as expected

existing_features.title: In the Header component (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx), replace the current logo image rendered inside the header button (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]/button[1]/img[1]) with the original saved Deeds logo asset at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/deeds-logo.png'. Ensure the img src points to '/assets/generated/deeds-logo.png'.

In the main page/hero section (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/img[1]), replace the current logo image with the original saved Deeds logo asset at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/deeds-logo.png'. Ensure the img src points to '/assets/generated/deeds-logo.png'. This likely corresponds to the Gate or LoginPrompt component hero logo.
